description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a large arched glass door, flanked by wide windows and a double garage door. The exterior walls are primarily white, with large rectangular windows distributed across all sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear of the house includes a sunroom or enclosed patio with floor-to-ceiling windows, and the upper floor has a balcony or terrace area. The interior layout is visible through the windows, showing multiple rooms and open spaces. The overall appearance is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a focus on functionality and openness.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent arched entryway. Features include a double garage, sunroom, and balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, double garage door, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sunroom/enclosed patio and several windows, with a glimpse of interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a row of windows, the sunroom extension, and the flat roof's terrace area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the internal room layout, with less emphasis on entry features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and a sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent arched glass door with sidelights, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
